modules.name: messagebus.typing
documentation: Propagate commands and events to every registered handles.

modules.name: messagebus.domain.model
documentation:
Message base classes.

`Command` and `Event` are two types used to handle changes in the model.

class_variables.name: messagebus.domain.model.Metadata.name
documentation: Name of the schema.

class_variables.name: messagebus.domain.model.Metadata.schema_version
documentation: Version of the schema.

class_variables.name: messagebus.domain.model.Metadata.published
documentation: Publish the event to an eventstream.

classes.name: messagebus.domain.model.Message

class_variables.name: messagebus.domain.model.Message.message_id
documentation: Unique identifier of the message.

class_variables.name: messagebus.domain.model.Message.created_at
documentation:
Timestamp of the message.

All messages are kept in order for observability, debug and event replay.

class_variables.name: messagebus.domain.model.Message.metadata
documentation:
Define extra fields used at serialization.

While serializing the message, a name and version must be defined to properly
defined the message. Event if the class is renamed, those constants must be kept
identically over the time in the codebase.

metadata are defined statically at the definition of the message.
Base class for messaging.

classes.name: messagebus.domain.model.GenericCommand
documentation: Baseclass for message of type command.

classes.name: messagebus.domain.model.GenericEvent
documentation: Baseclass for message of type event.

classes.name: messagebus.domain.model.GenericModel

class_variables.name: messagebus.domain.model.GenericModel.messages
documentation:
List of messages consumed by the unit of work to mutate the repository.

Those message are ephemeral, published by event handler and consumed
by the unit of work during the process of an original command.
Base class for model.

classes.name: messagebus.service.eventstream.AbstractMessageSerializer

methods.name: messagebus.service.eventstream.AbstractMessageSerializer.serialize_message
documentation: Publish a message to the eventstream.

The message serializer take the message and return it with python native types,
that are serializable for a transport.

classes.name: messagebus.service.eventstream.MessageSerializer

methods.name: messagebus.service.eventstream.MessageSerializer.serialize_message
documentation: Publish a message to the eventstream.
Default message serializer

classes.name: messagebus.service._sync.eventstream.SyncAbstractEventstreamTransport

methods.name: messagebus.service._sync.eventstream.SyncAbstractEventstreamTransport.send_message_serialized
documentation: Publish a serialized message to the eventstream.
Transport a message to the event stream.

classes.name: messagebus.service._sync.eventstream.SyncSinkholeEventstreamTransport

methods.name: messagebus.service._sync.eventstream.SyncSinkholeEventstreamTransport.send_message_serialized
documentation: Do nothing.

Drop all messages.

By default, the events are not streamed until it is configured to do so.

classes.name: messagebus.service._sync.eventstream.SyncEventstreamPublisher

methods.name: messagebus.service._sync.eventstream.SyncEventstreamPublisher.__init__
documentation: Publish a message to the eventstream.

methods.name: messagebus.service._sync.eventstream.SyncEventstreamPublisher.send_message
documentation:
Publish a message to the eventstream.

To publish a message in the eventstream, the flag parameter "published" of
the metadata of the message must be set to true.
By default, message are not pushed to the queue, given the control of
private message, such as command, and public event, shared with eventstream
consumers.

Publish a message to the event stream.

```
param serializer

Used to serialize the Message

param transport

Used to send the serialized message to the eventstream.
```

modules.name: messagebus.service._sync.repository
documentation:
Repositories are used to fetch and store domain models.

Anstract repositories derived the {class}`messagebus.AsyncAbstractRepository`
class to declare every models interface such as CRUD operations,
and then concrete models implements those abstract methods for a given
storage.

classes.name: messagebus.service._sync.repository.SyncAbstractRepository
documentation: Abstract Base Classe for Repository pattern.

methods.name: messagebus.service._sync.repository.SyncEventstoreAbstractRepository._add
documentation: Add a message to the storage backend of event repository.

methods.name: messagebus.service._sync.repository.SyncEventstoreAbstractRepository.add
documentation:
Add the message to the storage backend and mark as seen

seen message will be sent to the eventstream only if the unit of work
has properly commit the transaction.
If the transaction is rollback, then, message will be dropped too from the
eventstream.

methods.name: messagebus.service._sync.repository.SyncEventstoreAbstractRepository.publish_eventstream
documentation: Publish seen message to the eventstream.

classes.name: messagebus.service._sync.repository.SyncSinkholeEventstoreRepository

methods.name: messagebus.service._sync.repository.SyncSinkholeEventstoreRepository._add
documentation: Do nothing. The sinkhole drop every message.
An eventstore that drop all the message.

modules.name: messagebus.service._sync.registry
documentation: Propagate commands and events to every registered handles.

functions.name: messagebus.service._sync.registry.sync_listen
documentation:
Decorator to listen for a command or an event.

Note that you can handle one listener for a command, and many for events.
The command handler result is returned by the handle call of the message bus.

classes.name: messagebus.service._sync.registry.ConfigurationError
documentation: Prevents bad usage of the add_listener.

classes.name: messagebus.service._sync.registry.SyncMessageBus

methods.name: messagebus.service._sync.registry.SyncMessageBus.handle
documentation:
Notify listener of that event registered with `messagebus.add_listener`.
Return the first event from the command.

methods.name: messagebus.service._sync.registry.SyncMessageBus.scan
documentation:
Scan the module (or modules) containing service handlers.

when a message is handled by the bus, the bus propagate the message
to hook functions, called {term}`Service Handler` that receive the message,
and a {term}`Unit Of Work` to process it has a business transaction.
Store all the handlers for commands an events.

classes.name: messagebus.service._async.eventstream.AsyncAbstractEventstreamTransport

methods.name: messagebus.service._async.eventstream.AsyncAbstractEventstreamTransport.send_message_serialized
documentation: Publish a serialized message to the eventstream.
Transport a message to the event stream.

classes.name: messagebus.service._async.eventstream.AsyncSinkholeEventstreamTransport

methods.name: messagebus.service._async.eventstream.AsyncSinkholeEventstreamTransport.send_message_serialized
documentation: Do nothing.

Drop all messages.

By default, the events are not streamed until it is configured to do so.

classes.name: messagebus.service._async.eventstream.AsyncEventstreamPublisher

methods.name: messagebus.service._async.eventstream.AsyncEventstreamPublisher.__init__
documentation: Publish a message to the eventstream.

methods.name: messagebus.service._async.eventstream.AsyncEventstreamPublisher.send_message
documentation:
Publish a message to the eventstream.

To publish a message in the eventstream, the flag parameter "published" of
the metadata of the message must be set to true.
By default, message are not pushed to the queue, given the control of
private message, such as command, and public event, shared with eventstream
consumers.

Publish a message to the event stream.

```
param serializer

Used to serialize the Message

param transport

Used to send the serialized message to the eventstream.
```

modules.name: messagebus.service._sync.unit_of_work
documentation: Unit of work

classes.name: messagebus.service._sync.unit_of_work.TransactionError
documentation: A runtime error raised if the transaction lifetime is inappropriate.

classes.name: messagebus.service._sync.unit_of_work.TransactionStatus
documentation: Transaction status used to ensure transaction lifetime.

methods.name: messagebus.service._sync.unit_of_work.SyncUnitOfWorkTransaction.__exit__
documentation: Rollback in case of exception.

classes.name: messagebus.service._sync.unit_of_work.SyncAbstractUnitOfWork

methods.name: messagebus.service._sync.unit_of_work.SyncAbstractUnitOfWork.commit
documentation: Commit the transation.

methods.name: messagebus.service._sync.unit_of_work.SyncAbstractUnitOfWork.rollback
documentation: Rollback the transation.

Abstract unit of work.

To implement a unit of work, the {meth}`AsyncAbstractUnitOfWork.commit` and
{meth}`AsyncAbstractUnitOfWork.rollback` has to be defined, and some repositories
has to be declared has attributes.
